name: GET /api/v1/doctors — 503 CHAOS_ERROR on every request when FAIL_PROBABILITY=1 @chaos
statusMessage: Restart server with CHAOS_ENABLED=true CHAOS_FAIL_PROBABILITY=1, then: CHAOS_ENABLED=true npx playwright test chaos.test.js
